title: rubus × subbakonyensis
intro: Rubus × subbakonyensis, also known as the Hungarian raspberry, is a hybrid species of raspberry native to Europe. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its root, which contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Rubus × subbakonyensis include its potential to aid in reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus × subbakonyensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of applications.
